aboutPreview.subtitle: About BeeOnFarm
aboutPreview.description: BeeOnFarm is a digital beekeeping platform developed by OnFarm Agricultural Corporation. By combining IoT sensors, AI analytics, and mobile remote control technology, we increase productivity for beekeeping farms and provide transparent honey production history to consumers.

iot.title: IoT Sensor-based Real-time Data Collection
iot.desc: Monitor colony environment 24/7 including temperature, humidity, CO₂, sound, and weight.

ai.title: AI-based Predictive Analytics

traceability.title: Transparent Production History Management
traceability.desc: Record the entire process from production to distribution on blockchain for trust and transparency.

hero.title: About
hero.descriptionLine1: Introducing OnFarm Agricultural Corporation's vision, history, and partnerships.
hero.descriptionLine2: Connecting sustainable beekeeping through technology — BeeOnFarm is with you.

vision.subtitle: Our Vision
vision.descriptionP1: BeeOnFarm is a digital beekeeping platform developed by OnFarm Agricultural Corporation. By combining IoT sensors, AI analytics, and mobile remote control technology, we increase productivity for beekeeping farms and provide transparent honey production history to consumers.
vision.descriptionP2: We believe bees are key to a healthy ecosystem. Our mission is to support beekeeping farms through advanced technology, protect bee health, and provide safe and transparent honey to consumers.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: Leading the future of sustainable agriculture through digital beekeeping

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Creating a beekeeping ecosystem where everyone thrives through harmony of technology and nature

ceo.subtitle: CEO Message
ceo.title: "With the harmony of technology and nature,
ceo.titleHighlight: we dream of beekeeping that makes everyone happy
ceo.name: Kim OnFarm
ceo.greeting: Hello, I am Kim OnFarm, CEO of OnFarm Agricultural Corporation.
ceo.messageP1: BeeOnFarm started from the belief that "when bees are happy, people are happy too." Through our digital beekeeping system utilizing IoT sensors and AI technology, we are increasing productivity for beekeeping farms, monitoring bee health, and providing transparent and safe honey to consumers.
ceo.messageP2: Furthermore, we are creating social value through healing beekeeping programs and promoting sustainable growth of the beekeeping industry through our nectar source map service. BeeOnFarm will continue to build a new beekeeping ecosystem where technology and nature coexist in harmony.
ceo.signature: Kim OnFarm, CEO of OnFarm Agricultural Corporation

dataFlow.label: Data Flow
dataFlow.description: IoT sensors collect hive environment data every 5 minutes → Transmitted to cloud server via gateway → AI engine analyzes in real-time → Results delivered and notifications sent via mobile app

autoTemp.title: Auto Temperature Control
autoTemp.desc: Remotely manage hive temperature via smartphone and automatically maintain optimal temperature.

autoFeed.title: Auto Feeding Management
autoFeed.desc: Automatically feed bees using non-contact level sensors and electronic valves for improved efficiency.

realTimeMonitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
realTimeMonitoring.desc: Monitor temperature, humidity, CO₂, and weight data 24/7 in real time.

anomalyAlert.title: Anomaly Detection Alert
anomalyAlert.desc: Instantly notifies you of abnormal situations such as swarming signs and Asian giant hornet intrusion.

products.subtitle: Products
products.title: BeeOnFarm
products.description: Realize smart beekeeping with IoT devices optimized for beekeeping in the field.

sensor.title: BeeOnFarm IoT Sensor Module
sensor.subtitle: Measures everything about the hive environment
sensor.desc: An all-in-one IoT sensor module that precisely measures temperature, humidity, CO₂, weight, and vibration. Operates continuously for up to 6 months without external power using solar panels and lithium batteries.

controller.title: BeeOnFarm Smart Controller
controller.subtitle: Automatically controls temperature and feeding
controller.desc: An integrated control device combining a heating/cooling module that automatically maintains hive internal temperature at 34~36°C with an automatic feeding system based on non-contact level sensors and electronic valves.

gateway.title: BeeOnFarm Gateway
gateway.subtitle: Transmits sensor data to the cloud
gateway.desc: A relay device that collects data from up to 50 sensor modules and transmits it to the cloud server. Ensures stable LTE-M communication even in remote mountainous areas.

smartControl.subtitle: Smart Control
smartControl.title: Mobile
smartControl.description: Automate hive temperature control and feeding management with just a smartphone.

autoTemp.title: Auto Temperature Control System
autoTemp.desc: Detects hive internal temperature in real time and automatically maintains the set optimal temperature range (34~36°C). Effective for preventing winter freezing and summer overheating.

autoFeed.title: Auto Feeding Management System
autoFeed.desc: Non-contact level sensors detect feeder water levels, and electronic valves automatically supply sugar water (feed solution). Minimizes bee stress since beekeepers don't need to open the hive directly.

mobileApp.title: Mobile App Remote Management
mobileApp.desc: Check and control hive status anytime, anywhere via smartphone. View temperature, humidity, and feeding status at a glance on an intuitive dashboard.

nectarMap.subtitle: Nectar Source Map
nectarMap.title: Nectar Source Info &
nectarMap.description: View nationwide nectar source distribution and bee farm locations on a map at a glance, maximizing migratory beekeeping efficiency.

nectarInfo.title: Nectar Source Distribution Info
nectarInfo.desc: Visualizes the distribution of nectar plants (acacia, chestnut, cherry blossom, wild rose, etc.) nationwide on a map. Provides flowering periods and estimated nectar yields to help select optimal beekeeping locations.

farmLocation.title: Bee Farm Location Service
farmLocation.desc: Identify nearby bee farm locations to check density and recommend optimal routes for migratory beekeeping. Also contributes to building inter-regional beekeeper communities.

monitoring.subtitle: Monitoring
monitoring.title: Integrated
monitoring.description: Track all hive conditions numerically and let AI detect anomalies in advance.

anomaly.title: Anomalous Environment Detection
anomaly.desc: Measures hive temperature, humidity, and CO₂ levels in real time. Sends instant alerts when thresholds are exceeded for rapid response.

harvest.title: Honey Harvest Timing Prediction
harvest.desc: Precisely measures hive weight changes with load cells. AI analyzes weight increase patterns to predict and notify you of optimal honey harvest timing.

pollen.title: Pollen Monitoring
pollen.desc: Analyzes pollen collection at the hive entrance to assess colony health and activity levels. Pollen intake is a direct indicator of colony strength.

activity.subtitle: Activity & Alert
activity.title: Colony Activity Measurement &
activity.description: Analyzes bee entrance/exit activity in real time to provide early warnings for swarming signs and Asian giant hornet intrusion.

analysis.title: Colony Activity Analysis
analysis.desc: Sensors installed at the hive entrance record bee entrance/exit counts and patterns 24/7. AI algorithms learn normal patterns and detect abnormal activity.

swarming.title: Swarming Detection Alert
swarming.desc: When hive entrance activity increases sharply or abnormal patterns are detected, AI assesses the possibility of swarming (colony departure) and issues advance warnings.
swarming.alertDesc: Hive #3 entrance activity increased 280% compared to normal. Swarming probability 72%. On-site inspection recommended.

hornet.title: Asian Giant Hornet Intrusion Alert
hornet.desc: Hive entrance sensors detect the unique vibration patterns of Asian giant hornets and bee defensive behavior (heat ball response). Sends emergency notifications immediately upon hornet intrusion.
hornet.alertDesc: Asian giant hornet intrusion detected at Hive #7! Abnormal vibration pattern + defensive heat ball response confirmed. Immediate on-site action required.

techSpecs.subtitle: Tech Specs
techSpecs.title: Easy-to-Understand
techSpecs.description: Key technical specifications of the BeeOnFarm digital beekeeping system explained in simple terms.

items.note: 10 times more precise than a household thermometer

items.title: CO₂ Sensor
items.note: Real-time air quality monitoring inside the hive

items.title: Communication Module
items.note: Stable communication even in mountainous areas

education.subtitle: Education Center
education.title: Beekeeping Education

beginner.title: Beekeeping Basics Course
beginner.subtitle: Beekeeping Basics
beginner.schedule: Starts first week of every month
beginner.desc: A step-by-step education program for beginners, from basic theory to practice. Learn about bee ecology, colony management basics, and equipment usage.
beginner.targetAudience: Anyone interested in beekeeping (no experience required)

intermediate.title: Practical Beekeeping Course
intermediate.subtitle: Practical Beekeeping
intermediate.desc: An intermediate course focused on hands-on beekeeping skills. Build competencies in seasonal colony management, honey extraction, and disease prevention.
intermediate.targetAudience: Beginner course graduates or those with 1+ year of beekeeping experience

expert.title: Smart Beekeeping Expert
expert.subtitle: Smart Beekeeping Expert
expert.desc: Master cutting-edge digital beekeeping technologies including IoT sensors, AI data analysis, and mobile management. Become a BeeOnFarm certified expert upon completion.
expert.targetAudience: Practical course graduates or those with 3+ years of beekeeping experience

items.title: Advanced IoT Practice Environment
items.desc: Gain practical skills by directly experiencing BeeOnFarm's IoT sensors and AI analysis equipment.

items.title: Field Expert Instructors
items.desc: Education is conducted by beekeeping experts and therapists with 10+ years of experience.

items.title: Certificate Issuance

items.title: Education in Nature

items.title: Post-completion Support
items.desc: Continuous support including alumni community, equipment discounts, and technical consulting.

items.title: High Employment Rate
items.desc: 38% of graduates have successfully started beekeeping businesses or secured related employment.

healing.subtitle: Healing Agriculture
healing.description: The healing agriculture program in partnership with Purme Foundation is a special program that provides psychological stability and social connection through nature, bees, gardens, and forests. We offer customized healing experiences for diverse participants including people with developmental disabilities, elderly, and families.

nature.title: Nature-based Healing
nature.desc: Promote physical and mental well-being through activities stimulating all five senses using bees and natural environments.

expert.title: Professional Therapist Accompaniment
expert.desc: Programs are conducted by professionals including horticultural therapists and social workers.

partnership.title: Purme Foundation Partnership
partnership.desc: Operated in collaboration with Purme Foundation, a specialized institution for welfare of people with disabilities.

healing.detailDescription: We operate various healing beekeeping programs tailored to different participants and goals.

disabled.title: Healing Beekeeping for Developmental Disabilities
disabled.desc: Promote concentration improvement and emotional stability through bee observation, beeswax crafts, and honey harvesting experiences. Professional therapists accompany at a 1:3 ratio.

elderly.title: Senior Healing Beekeeping
elderly.desc: Experience physical activity and emotional exchange while caring for colonies in nature. An effective program for cognitive function maintenance and depression relief.

family.title: Family Experience Program
family.desc: A beekeeping experience program for parents and children together. Enjoy activities including bee observation, honey tasting, and beeswax candle making.

corporate.title: Corporate & Group Training Program
corporate.desc: A corporate training program combining team building and ESG activities. Experience sustainable values through beekeeping, honey harvesting, and environmental education.

healing.agricultureDescription: Beyond beekeeping, we operate various healing agriculture programs including garden cultivation, herb therapy, and forest healing.

garden.title: Healing Garden Cultivation
garden.desc: Plant and grow herbs, vegetables, and flowers to experience nature's healing power. A program with horticultural therapy experts.

aroma.title: Aroma & Herb Therapy
aroma.desc: Make aroma oil, soap, and tea with herbs you grew. A sensory healing program utilizing all five senses.

forest.title: Forest Healing Program
forest.desc: Forest healing activities near the apiary. Consists of forest walks, meditation, and nature craft activities.

cooking.title: Bee Table Cooking Class
cooking.desc: A program to learn food culture while cooking healthy dishes together using honey, bee products, and garden vegetables.

items.title: Healing the Mind
items.desc: Relieve stress and regain emotional stability through communion with nature. Experience inner peace through activities engaging all five senses.

items.title: Restoring Relationships
items.desc: Form social bonds through the process of working and harvesting together. Escape isolation and experience a warm community.

items.title: Joy of Growth
items.desc: Feel responsibility and achievement while caring for plants and bees. Small successes accumulate to find self-esteem and meaning in life.

testimonials.name: Mr./Ms. Kim
testimonials.text: I started knowing nothing, and in just 4 weeks I could do hive inspections on my own. The instructors are very kind and systematic.

testimonials.name: Lee Family
testimonials.text: My child was afraid of bees, but after the experience, they became interested in bees. The whole family had a special experience.

testimonials.name: GreenTech Co.
testimonials.text: Employee satisfaction was very high because we could do ESG activities and team building at the same time. We plan to apply again next quarter.

testimonials.name: Mr./Ms. Park (Guardian)
testimonials.text: My child showed great interest in beeswax crafts and their concentration noticeably improved. The therapists are truly professional.

program.processDescription: Join BeeOnFarm programs in 4 simple steps.

faq.q: Can I participate in the education program with no beekeeping experience?
faq.a: Yes, the beginner course is designed for complete beginners. We teach from basic theory step by step, and expert instructors provide 1:1 support.
Programs for people with developmental disabilities and seniors are free, supported by government funding and the Purme Foundation. Family experience and corporate programs have separate fees.

faq.q: Where is the education center located?
faq.a: Programs are held at the BeeOnFarm Education Center located at 224 Wanjusandan 6-ro, Bongdong-eup, Wanju-gun, Jeonbuk. Parking is available and shuttle bus service runs from Jeonju Station.

faq.q: What benefits are there after completion?
faq.a: We offer various benefits including BeeOnFarm official certificate, exclusive graduate community, IoT equipment discounts, and technical consulting. Expert course graduates can become BeeOnFarm partner beekeepers.

faq.q: What's the difference between healing agriculture and healing beekeeping?
faq.a: Healing beekeeping focuses on interaction with bees, while healing agriculture includes broader farming activities like garden cultivation, herb therapy, and forest healing. Both programs aim for physical and mental healing through nature.

faq.q: Are custom programs for groups (companies, schools) available?
faq.a: Yes, we design customized programs based on the group's purpose, size, and schedule. Please inquire about group programs on the Contact page and a representative will contact you.

program.ctaDescription: You can apply for education programs and healing agriculture on the Contact page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy
privacy.heroDescription: values users' personal information and complies with relevant laws and regulations.

sections.title: Article 1 (Purpose of Processing Personal Information)
sections.content: (hereinafter "the Company") processes personal information for the following purposes. Personal information being processed shall not be used for purposes other than the following, and necessary measures such as obtaining separate consent will be implemented if the purpose of use changes.
items: Service Provision: BeeOnFarm digital beekeeping system service, content delivery, customized service provision
Membership Registration & Management: Identity verification, personal identification, prevention of fraudulent use, various notices and notifications
Inquiry & Consultation Processing: Identification of inquirers, inquiry confirmation, contact for fact-finding, notification of processing results
Education Program Operation: Application and management for beekeeping education center and healing beekeeping program participation
Marketing & Advertising: New service development, event and promotional information provision (with optional consent)

sections.title: Article 2 (Processing and Retention Period of Personal Information)
sections.content: The Company processes and retains personal information within the retention and use period prescribed by law or agreed upon when collecting personal information from the data subject.
items: Service usage records: Until membership withdrawal (However, if retention is required by relevant laws, for the period prescribed by such laws)
Inquiry and consultation records: 3 years (Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce)
Education program participation records: 1 year after program completion
Electronic financial transaction records: 5 years (Electronic Financial Transactions Act)
Display and advertising records: 6 months (Electronic Commerce Act)

sections.title: Article 3 (Items of Personal Information Processed)
sections.content: The Company processes the following personal information items.
items: Required items: Name, contact number (phone), email address
Optional items: Affiliation (company/organization name), motivation for participation
Automatically collected items: Access IP, cookies, service usage records, access logs, visit date/time

sections.title: Article 4 (Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties)
sections.content: The Company processes personal information only within the scope specified in Article 1 and provides personal information to third parties only in cases corresponding to the consent of the data subject or special provisions of law.

sections.title: Article 5 (Destruction of Personal Information)
sections.content: When personal information becomes unnecessary due to the expiration of the retention period, achievement of the processing purpose, etc., the Company shall destroy the relevant personal information without delay.
items: Information in electronic file format is deleted using technical methods that prevent reproduction of records.
Personal information printed on paper is destroyed by shredding or incineration.

sections.title: Article 6 (Rights, Obligations, and Exercise Methods of Data Subjects)
sections.content: Data subjects may exercise the following rights related to personal information protection against the Company at any time.
items: Request to view personal information
Request for correction in case of errors
Request for deletion
Request to stop processing

sections.title: Article 7 (Measures to Ensure Safety of Personal Information)
sections.content: The Company takes the following measures to ensure the safety of personal information.
items: Administrative measures: Establishment and implementation of internal management plans, regular employee training
Technical measures: Access control for personal information processing systems, storage of access records, installation of security programs, encryption of personal information
Physical measures: Access control for server rooms, document storage rooms, etc.

sections.title: Article 8 (Personal Information Protection Officer)
sections.content: The Company designates a personal information protection officer as follows to take overall responsibility for processing personal information and to handle complaints and damage relief of data subjects related to personal information processing.
items: Department: Personal Information Protection Team
Email:
Phone:

sections.title: Article 9 (Changes to Privacy Policy)
sections.content: This privacy policy is effective from January 1, 2026. Previous privacy policies can be found below. Any changes will be announced through the website.

privacy.contactCta: If you have any questions about the privacy policy, please feel free to contact us at any time.

terms.subtitle: Terms of Service
terms.title: Terms of
terms.heroDescription: Terms and conditions for using BeeOnFarm services.
terms.contactCta: If you have questions about the terms of service, please don't hesitate to contact us.

sections.title: Article 1 (Purpose)
sections.content: (hereinafter "the Company") provides BeeOnFarm services (hereinafter "the Service"). These terms regulate the conditions, procedures, rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the Company and users regarding use of the Service.

sections.title: Article 2 (Definitions)
items: "Service" refers to all services related to the BeeOnFarm digital beekeeping system provided by the Company.
"User" refers to members and non-members who use the Service provided by the Company in accordance with these terms.
"Member" refers to a person who has registered as a member by providing personal information to the Company and can continuously use the Company's services.
"Content" refers to all information provided by the Company through the Service, including beekeeping-related data, educational materials, and analysis reports.

sections.title: Article 3 (Effect and Amendment of Terms)
items: These terms take effect by posting on the service screen or by notifying users through other methods.
The Company may amend these terms to the extent that it does not violate relevant laws.
If the terms are changed, the Company shall post the changes through service announcements at least 7 days before the effective date.

sections.title: Article 4 (Provision of Services)
sections.content: The Company provides the following services.
items: IoT sensor-based real-time colony monitoring service
AI-based honey harvest prediction and analysis service
Nectar source map and migration route recommendation service
Mobile app-based remote management service
Beekeeping education center and healing beekeeping programs
Community and information sharing service
Other services determined by the Company

sections.title: Article 5 (Modification and Suspension of Services)
items: The Company may modify the services being provided according to operational and technical needs when there is a reasonable cause.
The Company may temporarily suspend the provision of services in the event of maintenance, replacement, breakdown, or communication disruption of information and communication facilities.
In case of service suspension, the Company shall give prior notice. However, if there are unavoidable circumstances where prior notice is not possible, notice may be given afterwards.

sections.title: Article 6 (Membership Registration)
items: Users apply for membership by filling in information according to the form established by the Company and expressing their agreement to these terms.
The Company shall approve the membership application under the preceding paragraph unless there are special reasons not to.

sections.title: Article 7 (User Obligations)
items: Users must comply with relevant laws, these terms, usage guidelines, and precautions when using the service.
Users must not register for or use the service by misusing another person's personal information.
Users must not commercially use information obtained through the service, such as reproduction, distribution, or broadcasting, without the Company's prior approval.
Users must not engage in activities that interfere with the stable operation of the service.

sections.title: Article 8 (Company Obligations)
items: The Company shall not engage in actions prohibited by relevant laws and these terms or actions contrary to public morals, and shall do its best to provide services continuously and stably.
The Company shall have security systems to protect users' personal information, and shall publicly disclose and comply with the privacy policy.
The Company shall handle opinions or complaints raised by users in connection with the use of services if they are found to be legitimate.

sections.title: Article 9 (Intellectual Property Rights)
items: Intellectual property rights for content included in the Service belong to the Company.
Users may not use information obtained through the Service for commercial purposes or provide it to third parties without the Company's prior written consent.

sections.title: Article 10 (Disclaimer)
items: The Company is exempt from responsibility for service provision when it is unable to provide services due to force majeure such as natural disasters without the Company's fault.
The Company is not responsible for service disruptions caused by the user's own fault.
The Company is not responsible for the reliability or accuracy of information, materials, or facts posted by users.

sections.title: Article 11 (Dispute Resolution)
sections.content: Matters not specified in these terms and interpretation of these terms shall follow relevant laws and customary practices. In case a lawsuit is filed regarding a dispute arising from the use of services, the court with jurisdiction over the Company's headquarters shall have jurisdiction.

sections.title: Supplementary Provisions
sections.content: These terms shall be effective from January 1, 2026.
